name: Banana Sour Cream Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Mix in the sour cream, mashed bananas, vanilla extract, flour, salt, and baking soda until combined.
4. Pour the batter into a jelly roll pan (15 x 10 x 2 inches).
5. Bake for about 30 minutes, or until set, checking at the 20-minute mark.
